description_long: This chair features a rounded, open-weave rattan or synthetic wicker back and sides, forming a supportive and visually airy shell. The seat is flat and fitted with a dark, likely cushioned pad for comfort, contrasting with the natural tan color of the woven frame. The chair is supported by a minimalist black metal base with four slender legs, providing stability while maintaining a lightweight appearance. The woven pattern is consistent throughout the back and sides, with thicker horizontal bands and thinner vertical strands. The open structure of the back and sides allows for ventilation and a modern aesthetic. The overall design suggests durability and style suitable for both casual and contemporary urban settings.
description: A rounded, open-weave rattan chair with a dark cushioned seat and slender black metal legs, blending comfort and modern style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved woven backrest, dark seat cushion, and the open, airy design.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angled backrest, the thickness of the woven frame, and the slim metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full woven back pattern and the continuous curve of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the sloped armrest and the open weave structure.
